posts.author: johan (Johannes Weiß)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to use the Monday email integration without hosting my emails at Google or Microsoft.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to host my emails with a local hosting provider. My company wants to become independent of US technology companies. Ideally, I would like to be able to connect any IMAP/SMTP email server to Monday.

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @johan, as there isn’t built-in support for connecting a custom IMAP/SMTP server directly.

If you are open to using third-party solutions, you can leverage the IMAP Email Connector app from the monday.com Marketplace to connect any standard IMAP/SMTP email server. This lets you host your email with a local provider and still integrate it with monday.com.
